title: Connected Boards column transferable in Automations

posts.author: S_Moore (Stephanie M)
posts.cookedHtml: I have recently run into a scenario in our workflow where it would have been helpful to be able to move my connected board column through an automation. For further detail, we have our customers on one board and we have a pre order and an order board. When I link them through ‘Connect Boards’ to their pre order, I have an automation set up that once the order is finalized, we can click a button and the item is moved and an item is created in the order board with all the same details, except the customer since Connect Boards cannot be transferred through automations. It would be nice if this could be something Monday considers adding down the line.
